summary: Tested two new features: 1) Auto-create lease when creating tenant with lease dates, 2) Dashboard warning banners for expiring/expired leases. All features working correctly. Backend API tests: 6 passed, 3 skipped (no available apartment). Frontend UI tests: All passed.

backend_api.POST_tenants_with_lease_dates: PASS - Creates both tenant and lease when lease_start_date AND lease_end_date provided
backend_api.POST_tenants_without_lease_dates: PASS - Creates tenant only, lease_id is null
backend_api.POST_tenants_partial_dates: PASS - Only start_date provided, no lease created
backend_api.GET_leases: PASS - Returns end_date, start_date, tenant_name, status for expiry check
backend_api.POST_leases: PASS - Direct lease creation still works

frontend_ui.tenant_modal_lease_fields: PASS - Shows 'Huurovereenkomst' section with Startdatum and Einddatum fields
frontend_ui.lease_fields_only_for_new: PASS - Lease date fields hidden when editing existing tenant
frontend_ui.dashboard_expired_warning: PASS - Red banner shows '1 huurovereenkomst verlopen - Maria Tester'
frontend_ui.dashboard_expiring_warning: PASS - Orange banner shows '1 huurovereenkomst verlopen binnen 30 dagen - Peter de Huurder (2026-04-15)'
frontend_ui.huurovereenkomsten_table: PASS - Shows leases with correct status badges (Actief/Verlopen)
frontend_ui.lease_crud_buttons: PASS - Eye (document), Edit, Delete buttons present

features_tested: Navigate to Admin Dashboard via Beheerder button
TenantModal shows Startdatum and Einddatum fields under 'Huurovereenkomst' section (only for new tenants)
Backend POST /api/kiosk/admin/tenants with lease_start_date and lease_end_date creates both tenant and lease
Backend returns lease_id in response when lease is auto-created
Dashboard shows red warning banner for expired leases
Dashboard shows orange warning banner for leases expiring within 30 days
Existing lease CRUD still works (create, edit, delete, document generation)
critical_code_review_comments: TenantModal (lines 1437-1544) correctly implements lease date fields with data-testid='tenant-lease-start' and 'tenant-lease-end'
Lease fields only shown for new tenants (!tenant condition on line 1512)
Backend create_tenant (lines 618-687 in kiosk.py) auto-creates lease when both lease_start_date AND lease_end_date provided
DashboardTab (lines 302-427) correctly filters expired and expiring leases with proper date comparison
Warning banners use correct data-testid: 'expired-leases-warning' and 'expiring-leases-warning'

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 passed, 3 skipped due to no available apartment)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test leases (Maria Tester expired, Peter de Huurder expiring) and apartment E505 for testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features tested and working: 1) TenantModal has lease date fields (Startdatum/Einddatum) that auto-create lease when creating new tenant. 2) Dashboard shows warning banners for expired (red) and expiring within 30 days (orange) leases. 1 lease exists for Jan de Test (A101, 2026-01-01 to 2027-01-01). 4 apartments all occupied. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
